intro: Sciodaphyllum duidae, also known as the Duid Daphne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Sciodaphyllum duidae include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
